scholarships.name: NBMBAA Scholarship Program
scholarships.why: Core match — Black MBA student, over $2.5M awarded annually. Must be active NBMBAA member.
scholarships.requirements: Active NBMBAA membership required. Academic excellence, leadership, communication skills. One recommendation from instructor, advisor, or supervisor.
scholarships.notes: Become an NBMBAA member before applying — membership is required for eligibility.

scholarships.name: Paul & Daisy Soros Fellowship for New Americans
scholarships.amount: Up to $90,000 over 2 years (50% tuition up to $20K/yr + $25K stipend/yr)
scholarships.why: Children of immigrants qualify. $90K over 2 years. Nigerian + Mexican parentage is a strong story.
scholarships.requirements: Must be 30 or younger at deadline. Immigrant or child of immigrants. Enrolled full-time in US grad program in 2027-2028. Must not be past 2nd year of current grad program. Transcripts, resume/CV, 2 essays, 3-5 recommendations required.
scholarships.notes: Highly competitive — 30 selected from thousands. Application is open NOW. This is the highest-value scholarship on this list. Start early.

scholarships.name: TY Danjuma MBA Scholarship
scholarships.why: Specifically for African (including Nigerian) students accepted to FT top-10 MBA programs.
scholarships.requirements: Must be African student accepted to a top-10 FT-ranked MBA program. Submit to mba@tyd-fo.co.uk between June 1–30 only. Requires: personal budget, funding shortfall doc, confirmation letters for all other scholarships/loans.
scholarships.notes: Applications sent before June 1 will NOT be processed. Confirm Rice's FT ranking qualifies. Up to 8 students supported per year.

scholarships.name: MLT MBA Prep Program
scholarships.amount: Program coaching + scholarship access at partner schools
scholarships.deadline: Rolling — Traditional & Two-Year tracks closed Jan 12, 2026. Accelerated track (fall 2027 MBA) still open.
scholarships.why: Coaching program for underrepresented talent applying to top MBAs. Unlocks partner school scholarships and recruiter network.
scholarships.requirements: US citizen, permanent resident, DACA or TPS. Minimum 1 year post-undergrad work experience. Official GMAT, GRE, or EA score required. Contact: mba-apply@mlt.org.
scholarships.notes: This is a prep program, not a direct scholarship — but it dramatically improves scholarship outcomes at partner schools.

scholarships.name: Forté MBA Fellowship
scholarships.amount: Varies by school (Rice is a confirmed partner)
scholarships.deadline: Selected automatically at admission — no separate application
scholarships.why: Rice University is a Forté partner. Fellows are selected at admission. Application fee waiver available for Forté MBALaunch members.
scholarships.requirements: No separate application. Must apply to Rice MBA. Rice selects Forté Fellows from admitted students. Diverse backgrounds + leadership commitment required.
scholarships.notes: MBALaunch program (deadline Feb 1, 2027) gives pre-MBA coaching and may improve Forté Fellowship selection odds.

scholarships.name: NCAA Postgraduate Scholarship
scholarships.deadline: Spring window closes ~May 4 annually (Outdoor Track & Field season)
scholarships.why: Former 4x All-American in Track & Field at Texas A&M — exactly the profile this targets.
scholarships.requirements: Must be nominated by Texas A&M Faculty Athletics Representative (FAR) or their designee — you cannot self-apply. Each school may nominate up to 5 student-athletes per gender per sport season. Minimum 3.2 GPA undergraduate. Must have performed with distinction as a varsity athlete.
scholarships.notes: ACTION REQUIRED: Contact Texas A&M Athletics or former coaches to request a FAR nomination. This is nomination-only — no self-apply portal.

scholarships.name: Pat Tillman Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.deadline: ~February 1 annually (2026 deadline was Feb 1, 2026 at 11:59 PM PST)
scholarships.why: Open to service members, veterans, and military spouses. Army Reserve parent connection — verify dependent eligibility.
scholarships.requirements: Must be enrolled full-time at accredited US college/university. Eligible for service members, veterans, and military spouses. Contact scholarships@pattillmanfoundation.org to confirm dependent eligibility before applying.
scholarships.notes: IMPORTANT: Verify whether dependent children (son of Army Reserve parent) qualify — search results show service members, veterans, and spouses but not children explicitly. Email them to confirm.

scholarships.name: Consortium for Graduate Study in Management
scholarships.amount: Full or partial tuition fellowships (varies by partner school)
scholarships.why: Mission is to reduce underrepresentation of African Americans, Hispanic Americans, and Native Americans in business. Black + Mexican = strong dual eligibility.
scholarships.requirements: US citizen, permanent resident, or DACA. Demonstrate commitment to Consortium's diversity mission. 4-year bachelor's degree. Must apply through a CGSM partner school — confirm Rice Jones is a partner at cgsm.org.
scholarships.notes: Check if Rice Jones MBA is a Consortium partner school. If it is, this is the highest-leverage scholarship on the list outside of Soros.

scholarships.name: Hispanic Scholarship Fund (HSF) Scholar
scholarships.deadline: ~February 15 annually (2026 deadline was Feb 15, 2026 at 2:00 PM PT)
scholarships.why: Open to all students who identify as Hispanic heritage. Mexican parentage qualifies. Grad students eligible.
scholarships.requirements: Minimum 2.5 GPA. Full-time enrollment at accredited US grad school. Must complete FAFSA. No essays, recommendations, or document uploads required in Phase I (approx. 30 minutes to complete).
scholarships.notes: Very low friction to apply — no essays or recommendations in Phase I. Apply early in the cycle.

scholarships.name: Robert Toigo Foundation Fellowship
scholarships.amount: Financial support + career development, mentorship, recruiting access
scholarships.why: For underrepresented minorities pursuing careers in finance (VC, PE, investment management, entrepreneurship). Black + Mexican = dual eligibility.
scholarships.requirements: Full-time graduate student (MBA, Master's, etc.) pursuing finance career. Strong analytical/technical skills. Virtual attendance required if accepted. Contact: Apply@toigofoundation.org. High-scoring candidates invited to Catapult program (~April).
scholarships.notes: 2026 cycle has closed (deadline was March 6, 2026). Next cycle opens ~October 2026. Start preparing now.

scholarships.name: Military MBA Scholarships (aggregator)
scholarships.why: Aggregator site listing military-connected MBA scholarships. Son of Army Reserve parent may qualify as military-connected dependent.
scholarships.requirements: Varies by specific scholarship. Review each listing on militarymba.net for dependent-specific programs.
scholarships.notes: Research each individual program on this site for dependent eligibility. Some are service-member only, others include dependents and spouses.
